sections.biography-source-undefined:
Dong Fang was from Dingtao county, Jiyin commandery. Because he was in the army of Zhang Miao, his older brother Dong Zhao, who served Yuan Shao, was slandered which led to Dong Zhao being fleeing Yuan Shao having lost favor.

Dong Fang eventually joined Wei and was enfeoffed as Marquis within the Passes by Emperor Cao Pi in 222.

full_text:
Dong Fang 董訪
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Dong Fang (董訪)was born in Dingtao county, Jiyin commandery. His service to Zhang Miao led to Dong Zhao losing favour with Yuan Shao. Dong Fang was affiliated with Zhang Miao and the Wei Kingdom.

BiographySource Undefined
Dong Fang was from Dingtao county, Jiyin commandery. Because he was in the army of Zhang Miao, his older brother Dong Zhao, who served Yuan Shao, was slandered which led to Dong Zhao being fleeing Yuan Shao having lost favor.
Dong Fang eventually joined Wei and was enfeoffed as Marquis within the Passes by Emperor Cao Pi in 222.
